package rulecoverage

func NegativeTracingSpanNamesDuplicatedAsRawStrings() string {
    ruleID := "tracing_span_names_duplicated_as_raw_strings"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Repeated raw span-name literals across handlers and services."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
